message: This permission allows managing (create, edit, delete) Salesforce authentication providers, which enable SSO and external identity integrations.

description: Severely restrict "Manage Auth. Providers" to very few trusted identity administrators. Unauthorized changes risk authentication bypass or catastrophic breaches. Implement robust change management and MFA for these admins. This aligns with ISO 27001, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, and OWASP Top 10.
name: Manage Auth. Providers

application.link_path: Select a profile > Click on 'System Permissions' > Find 'Mass Email'
application.name: Salesforce resource permissions

vendor_setting.link_path: Select a profile > Click on 'System Permissions' > Find 'Mass Email'
vendor_setting.setting_description: This permission allows a user to send mass emails to leads, contacts, or person accounts from Salesforce.

message: This permission allows a user to send mass emails to leads, contacts, or person accounts from Salesforce.

description: Restrict "Mass Email" to authorized marketing/sales/communication professionals. Misuse risks spam, phishing, and sender reputation. Implement clear usage policies and ensure recipient consent. This aligns with ISO 27001, NIST CSF, and GDPR.
name: Mass Email
